prd.user_story: As a developer, I want to: Prometheus crashes with 'out of bound samples' when cardinality is high. Find the Go source files in prometheus/prometheus that (1) enforce the head block series limit and (2) handle out-of-order or out-of-bound samples in the TSDB head.
constraints: Provide specific file paths and repository names in your answer.
prd.success_definition: Agent successfully identifies relevant files and symbols across all repos in the prometheus-monitoring fixture.
prd.seed_prompt: Prometheus crashes with 'out of bound samples' when cardinality is high. Find the Go source files in prometheus/prometheus that (1) enforce the head block series limit and (2) handle out-of-order or out-of-bound samples in the TSDB head.
